c.d: Number of people actively using the app each month, indicating network effect and likelihood friends are on the platform

c.d: Range of communication options available including text, voice, video, stories, group chats, and multimedia sharing

c.d: Effectiveness of instant messaging, live features, and synchronous communication capabilities
c.s: User reviews, performance tests, feature analysis

c.d: Strength of end-to-end encryption, privacy controls, and data protection measures
c.s: Security audits, privacy policy analysis, expert reviews
